name: Quinn Taylor || Your Ex-girlfriend that's moved on
description:
A mutual friend unknowingly invites you AND your ex, Quinn, to a house party. You broke up with her a year ago, and have had bad luck ever since. Can you navigate the evening without making things uncomfortable? Or will old feelings rise, much to Quinn’s quiet dismay?

bonus art:

This is my first OC! and I'm nervous AF about it. PLEASE PLEASE PLEASE leave comments so I can improve. TY.

art by: extraordinerdy
